community.text: Cella is open-source en wil samenwerken met andere open-source projecten en teams.
community.title: Sneller samen
call_to_action.start: Jumpstart your next project using Cella. We're partnering with a few experienced and ambitious teams and helping them get started.
cards.blocknote.text: Block-based rich-text editor with real-time collaboration options and a minimal setup
cards.brevo.text: Brevo sends transactional emails and more.
cards.gleap.text: Gleap is an all-in-one customer feedback tool. Live chat, customer satisfaction, public roadmap and more.
cards.matrix.text: Matrix is an open network for secure, decentralized communication. Real-time chat, VoIP and more.
cards.onedollarstats.text: Affordable web analytics. Track event effortlessly. Access insights through dashboards or mobile app.
cards.paddle.text: Complete billing solution: Accept payments, handle taxes and manage subscriptions.
cards.scaleway.text: Scaleway offers compute, object storage, managed postgres, generative API.
cards.transloadit.text: Transloadit is a file handling service that helps you with uploading, transforming and storing files.
cella_approach: Cella's sync-engine past waarschijnlijk beter als:
cella_approach_intro: Er zijn sync-frameworks en sync-databases die veel werk voor je uit handen nemen. Maar dan moet je accepteren dat zij eigenaar worden van je schema's, queries en opslag.
cella_approach_point_1: Je wilt gewoon sync toevoegen waar het ertoe doet.
cella_approach_point_2: Je REST API moet authoritative blijven.
cella_approach_point_3: Vendor lock-in or framework constraints are not acceptable
compare_intro: Have a look at how Cella compares to existing sync solutions such as Electric, Zero, PowerSync and more ..
features.text: For a complete list of features, <featuresLink>click here</featuresLink>.
features.title: Kernfuncties
features.activity_bus.text: Every data change flows through one place that feeds live updates, cache refresh and the audit log together.
features.attachment.text: A real synced entity you can use today: resumable uploads, signed URLs and live updates per organisation.
features.autogenerated_docs.text: Live API docs are generated from your routes and always stay in step with your endpoints.
features.blocknote_editor.text: A block-based rich text editor with real-time collaboration and presence.
features.cache_integrity.text: The app double-checks its cached data against the server to catch any missed create or delete — at no extra cost.
features.cache_persistence.text: The app's cache is saved in the browser so it loads instantly and works offline, writing only what actually changed.
features.cache_token.text: Live updates carry signed tokens that let a slightly stale client read from cache instead of the database.
features.canonical_queries.text: One source list per entity stays fresh, and narrower views derive from it without extra server calls.
features.cdc_batching.text: Many row changes in one transaction collapse into a single live update, keeping traffic light.
features.cella_cli.text: Pull bug fixes and new features from upstream Cella into your fork with minimal merge friction.
features.context_entities.text: Entities that have members and roles. Each user's membership and permissions are attached automatically, no extra API calls.
features.create_edit_coalescing.text: Create and edit offline, and one request sends the final result. Create then delete, and nothing is sent at all.
features.data_grid.text: A data grid with sorting, multi-select and column management for content-heavy views.
features.docker.text: Auto-generated Docker Compose for local dev and a lean multi-stage build for production.
features.drawer_patterns.text: Drawers and similar components give the app a native feel, especially on mobile.
features.drizzle_orm.text: Type-safe, schema-first database access — change a schema and generate the migration with one command.
features.email_templates.text: Type-safe transactional emails with translations, plus a live preview to design them in the browser.
features.embedded_propagation.text: Change something once and every copy of it across the app updates instantly — no refetch, no stale data.
features.entity_hierarchy.text: Define all your entities — users, organisations, projects — in one config that drives security, permissions, menus and counters automatically.
features.eu_cloud.text: EU-based hosting for data residency and compliance from day one.
features.file_based_routing.text: Drop a file in the routes folder and it's registered into a type-safe route tree automatically.
features.gap_detection.text: On reconnect, the app knows exactly what changed while you were away and fetches only that — including removals.
features.github_actions.text: Push to main and CI ships it — zero-downtime deploys on every commit.
features.guard_chain.text: Every request passes through layered checks for session, tenant and membership before any code runs.
features.i18n.text: Built-in translations with instant language switching — English and Dutch included.
features.idempotent_mutations.text: Every change has a stable id, so retrying after a dropped response or a crash never causes duplicates.
features.immutability.text: Key identity fields can't be changed after creation, and the activity log can only be added to, never edited.
features.impersonation.text: Admins can safely act as any user for support and debugging — locked behind an IP allowlist.
features.load_testing.text: Repeatable load tests with saved baselines — run them with one command.
features.magic_link.text: Passwordless sign-in by default — a single-use link sent by email, rate-limited and brute-force protected.
features.mfa.text: Add a second factor with a passkey or authenticator app, and require re-confirmation for sensitive actions.
features.mock_generators.text: One source powers API examples, database seeds and load-test data — always in step with your schemas.
features.modular_structure.text: A flat-root pnpm monorepo where every feature lives in its own module — scaffold only what you need and pull upstream with less friction.
features.multi_tab.text: One tab holds the live connection and shares updates with the rest. Every tab can edit, none connects twice.
features.notify_then_fetch.text: When data changes, you get a tiny live signal and the app fetches just the changed rows. No polling, no bloated payloads.
features.oauth.text: Let users sign in with GitHub, Google or Microsoft, secured with modern OAuth best practices.
features.offline_queue.text: Edits made offline are saved locally and replay automatically when you reconnect — with conflicts kept rare.
features.openapi_extensions.text: Guards, rate limits and caches are declared per endpoint and shown automatically in the docs.
features.openapi_sdk.text: Your backend generates a fully typed client SDK — schemas, types and a fetch client — with one command.
features.organization.text: The built-in organisation entity with members, invitations and roles you can adjust to fit your app.
features.otel.text: End-to-end traces, metrics and logs across the whole stack with OpenTelemetry.
features.page.text: A public page entity with real-time co-editing — no login required to view or collaborate.
features.passkey.text: Phishing-resistant passkeys as your main login — no passwords to leak or reset.
features.per_field_merge.text: No merge conflicts. Different field types resolve automatically, so two people editing at once just works.
features.permission_manager.text: Role-based access that understands your hierarchy, resolving who can do what by walking memberships up the tree.
features.product_entities.text: Your everyday content models. Start as plain REST, then add offline support and real-time updates when you need them.
features.public_private.text: Two live streams: a private one for your org data and a public one for shareable content — each with its own scope.
features.pulumi_iac.text: Repeatable infrastructure as code — spin up your whole stack with one command.
features.pwa.text: An installable app that works offline, with assets cached for true offline use.
features.rate_limiting.text: Login endpoints are rate-limited and brute-force protected, so credential stuffing hits a wall.
features.resizable_panels.text: Resizable, collapsible panels that remember their layout between sessions.
features.responsive.text: Mobile-first layouts that adapt cleanly from phone to desktop.
features.rls.text: Every data table is locked down in the database itself: without the right context, queries simply return nothing.
features.rls_read_write.text: Reads and writes use separate database paths, so heavy reads never block writes and stay fast under load.
features.schema_evolution.text: Change your data model without breaking older clients. Migrations and adapters keep new and old app versions talking.
features.seen_unseen.text: Track who has seen each item and show live unseen counts — perfect for notification badges.
features.session_management.text: Users can see where they're logged in and sign out any device they don't recognise.
features.storybook.text: Build and review components in isolation with Storybook.
features.sync_stale_time.text: While the live stream is connected, data stays fresh without redundant refetches — updates come from the stream itself.
features.tenant_isolation.text: A hard boundary in the database keeps each tenant's data fully separate — no accidental cross-tenant access.
features.totp.text: Time-based one-time codes as a second factor, available once a passkey is set up.
features.ttl_cache.text: A server-side cache that turns one database query into a shared result for every waiting request.
features.unified_counts.text: Live totals per context are kept in one place and updated automatically — powering badges and sync checks with no extra queries.
features.user.text: A ready-made user entity — profile, settings, sessions, passkeys and social logins — wired into auth out of the box.
features.yjs_collaboration.text: Real-time co-editing with live presence. Concurrent edits merge cleanly, whether you're online or offline.
features.zero_downtime.text: Rolling deploys gated by health checks, with automatic rollback if a release goes wrong.
hero.text: Cella is an open-source TypeScript template to build web apps that need real-time & offline features. It uses Postgres, OpenAPI, React Query, Yjs.
hero.title: Your new app can have its own sync engine on day 1.
pricing.plan_1.title: pay €1k
pricing.plan_2.title: receive €1-12k
pricing.plan_3.title: To be decided
pricing.text_1: 50% to sponsor OS libraries and 50% to a Cella bounty program.
pricing.text_2: Earn while building your own product. Open-source or 'community-source' parts of your code.
pricing.text_3: Do you have a product that integrates well with CellaJS? Become a partner.
faq.text: Veelgestelde vragen. Staat je vraag er niet tussen? Neem dan contact met ons op.
faq.title: Veelgestelde vragen
integrations.text: Krachtige integraties om sneller naar de markt te gaan.
integrations.title: Integraties
pricing.text: Hoe bouw je een toegewijde en duurzame community rond CellaJS? Misschien via membership.
pricing.title: Prijzen (conceptueel)
selective_sync.text: Notion, Linear, Figma - gebruikers verwachten dat collaboratieve webapps realtime synchroniseren en offline werken. Maar deze functies zelf bouwen is lastig.
selective_sync.title: Sync is belangrijk, maar niet overal
showcase.title: Showcase
showcase.text: Explore the projects we're building with Cella and how they benefit from the Cella template.
showcase.text_1: An issue tracker to manage multiple app projects from a single page view. Built for speed & fun.
stack.artillery.text: Load testing for critical flows has been made easy.
stack.artillery.title: artillery
stack.baseui.text: Accessible components with BaseUI, Tailwind and Motion.
stack.baseui.title: base-ui & motion
stack.drizzle.text: Postgres DB with Drizzle ORM. Seeds and easy migrations.
stack.drizzle.title: postgres & drizzle
stack.hono.text: A simple and fast node server, easily extended with middleware.
stack.hono.title: hono
stack.openapi.text: Autogenerated types, zod schemas, client SDK & API docs.
stack.openapi.title: openapi-ts
stack.pulumi.text: Infrastructure as code for repeatable setup. Deploy using GitHub Actions.
stack.pulumi.title: pulumi
stack.react.text: React with Tanstack Router. Tanstack Query for fetching and caching.
stack.react.title: react & tanstack
stack.text: De beste TypeScript libraries in hun klasse. En ze werken goed samen.
stack.title: Een bewezen stack
stack.vite.text: A straightforward and fast monorepo setup. Vite PWA included.
stack.vite.title: vite & pnpm
stack.yjs.text: Real-time collaboration with presence as part of a rich-text editor.
stack.yjs.title: yjs
sync_flow: Cella follows a notify-then-fetch pattern: a Change Data Capture worker receives all Postgres logs, processes them and sends changes back to API → API sends an SSE to notify the client about a change → client then does a normal API request.
why.text_1: Postgres, OpenAPI & React Query are core primitives for all data. Some data is synced, some is fetched on demand.
why.text_2: Authentication, permissions, organizations, users & <featuresLink>much more</featuresLink>. Just remove code you don't like or need.
why.text_3: Building secure, compliant and scalable web apps on European infra is still hard. Cella makes it easier.
